programme.desc: Nandini is a self-assured girl who puts her family’s happiness above hers. On the other hand Surya hates his mother due to lingering resentments and deliberately bonds with Nandini to cause strife. Watch what destiny has in store for Nandini & Surya.

programme.title: Singapenne
programme.desc: Born into a humble & rustic background troubled by familial & financial concerns, Anandhi takes it upon herself to leave home & fearlessly pursue a better life for her family. Watch her bravely face the odds of life with unwavering spirit.

programme.title: Movie Contd - Kannodu Kanpathellam
programme.desc: Sitharam is in love with Kalyani and decides to propose to her. However, when two lovers, Akhila and Akash, play a prank on Sitharam which leads to him losing Kalyani, he takes revenge on them.

programme.title: Theechatti Govindan
programme.desc: Govindan, a police officer, pursues Uday and Raghu, the sons of a corrupt politician, for raping a nun. When he discovers that the two are involved in a robbery too, he tries to gather evidence.

programme.title: Thirudi
programme.desc: Aravind, who is training to be a karate champion, falls in love with Thamarai. However, things take a turn when he is forced to leave for Chennai.

programme.title: Vaitheeswaran
programme.desc: A young boy is killed by an aspiring politician; his upset mother tries to kill herself, but a man tells her that her son will be reborn. She waits for her son in a temple for 30 years; this attracts the curiosity of a doctor who offers to treat her.

programme.title: Magalirkkaga
programme.desc: Bhavani is a fair-minded inspector in an all-women police station. When a colleague is raped by a senior, she tries to bring him to justice. Her attempts are thwarted when her own fiance opposes her.

programme.title: Oomai Vizhigal
programme.desc: PRK is on a killing spree whereby he randomly kills women and is aided by a local politician and nefarious doctor. A policeman and a committed journalist join hands to nab him.

programme.title: Ponmanam
programme.desc: An unemployed Anandhan's family has no expectations from him. However, when his parents commit suicide after his sister elopes, he is determined to find her.

programme.title: Ratchasan
programme.desc: Arun gives up on his dream of becoming a filmmaker and takes up the job of a police officer after his father's death. He then attempts to track down a psycho killer.

programme.title: Poovellam Kettu Paar
programme.desc: Two friends, both music directors, have a bitter fall out after a fight with a film director. Later, their children end up falling in love with each other, and, when they learn of each other's fathers, come up with a plan to reunite their parents.

programme.title: Movie Contd - Poovellam Kettu Paar
programme.desc: Two friends, both music directors, have a bitter fall out after a fight with a film director. Later, their children end up falling in love with each other, and, when they learn of each other's fathers, come up with a plan to reunite their parents.

programme.title: Maa Inti Devatha
programme.desc: Raised as a single child, Bhoomi longs for a joint family's loving embrace and heart-warming bond. And when her dream comes true, watch her battle all odds and win over her husband's large family.

programme.title: Bhairavi
programme.desc: Born to a loving mother, Shivagami, and an evil father, Ashok, Bhairavi grows up to be a brave girl with abundant love and a divine grace. What happens when she faces with treachery & betrayal from the family?

programme.title: Moodu Mullu
programme.desc: Neelaveni, a strong-willed girl, places her family's happiness above hers. On the other hand, Tarak harbors resentment towards his mother & deliberately weds Neelaveni to cause strife. Watch Neelaveni & Tarak's destiny unfold.

programme.title: Bhamalu Satyabhamalu
programme.desc: A captivating women's show that actively engages its audience through thoughtfully curated activities, fun games, heartfelt chats, and inspiring stories. Join us for an enjoyable experience that will leave you feeling connected & uplifted.

programme.title: Kottaga Rekkalochenna
programme.desc: Kaveri's life has been a whirlwind of problems, betrayal & heartbreak until she crosses paths with Arjun. But things take an unexpected turn when Arjun's mother approaches Kaveri to heal the rift with her son. What does the future hold for Kaveri?

programme.title: Sivangi
programme.desc: Born into a humble and rustic background troubled by familial & financial concerns, Sivangi takes it upon herself to leave home and fearlessly pursue a better life for her family. Watch her bravely confront the odds of life with unwavering spirit.

programme.title: Maa Inti Devatha

programme.title: Sri hari Kalyanam
programme.desc: Lakshmi, the pillar of her family, marries Srihari with a promise to continue supporting her loved ones. But their marriage soon faces challenges that test their unity and happiness.

programme.title: Nandini
programme.desc: Nandini is a supernatural drama series. The story is about a rich influential family haunted by a snake's curse. While a good spirit helps the family from the snake by its supernatural powers.

programme.title: Ranga Ranga Pandu ranga
programme.desc: A pure-hearted devotee of Lord Panduranga, Sakhu's unwavering faith & selflessness, draw her closer to the divine but also spark jealousy, leading to poverty, betrayal, & suffering. Yet, her unshaken faith proves the power of devotion, goodness & love.

programme.title: Aadhi
programme.desc: Aadi,raised by a faithful employee of his father,learns about how his parents were cheated on and killed by Nagi Reddy.Angered by the injustice done to his family,he decides to confront Nagi.

programme.title: Gemini
programme.desc: When Gemini, a gangster, falls in love with a girl, he tries to reform his ways. Things change when a new police commissioner is transferred to the city, who plans on ending all criminal activities.

programme.title: Lagna Patrika
programme.desc: Vaishnavi's boyfriend turns out to be a criminal who takes advantage of her innocence and later kills her parents. So, she takes matters into her own hands and kills everybody that has wronged her.

programme.title: Chattambipaaru
programme.desc: Born into a humble, rustic background burdened by familial & financial struggles, Parvathi takes it upon herself to leave home & fearlessly pursue a better life for her family. Watch as she bravely faces the odds of life with an unwavering spirit.

programme.title: Peythozhiyaathe
programme.desc: Exuding warmth & courage, self-reliant Charulatha, living with an estranged father and a cruel stepmother, longs for a loving bond to escape her home. Will she find the love she seeks?

programme.title: Swayamvarapanthal
programme.desc: Nandini, a stunning village girl, works tirelessly out of deep devotion to her family. Meanwhile, fuelled by lingering resentment, Surya despises his mother & wilfully bonds with Nandini causing strife. Watch what destiny unfolds for Nandini & Surya

programme.title: Hridayam
programme.desc: In an unhappy marriage with a vicious wife, Dr.Niranjan's sole joy is his daughter Shruthi. While Sudhi & Devika believe they've found their soulmate in each other. But fate places them in a complex web of relationships when the couples cross paths.

programme.title: Kanyadanam
programme.desc: After his wife's demise Anandan is a doting father to his five daughters. As a man of strong values, he's an anchor & guiding light of love even after their marriage. Follow a loving father & his blessed daughters through the ups & downs of life.0

programme.title: Myna
programme.desc: Born into a humble & rustic background troubled by familial & financial concerns, Myna takes it upon herself to leave home & fearlessly pursue a better life for her family. Watch her bravely face the odds of life with unwavering spirit.

programme.title: Nandini
programme.desc: Nandini is a supernatural drama series. The story is about a rich influential family haunted by a snake's curse and how a good spirit helps the family from the snake by its supernatural powers.

programme.title: Shambavi
programme.desc: Born to a loving mother, Shivagami, and an evil father, Ashok, Shambhavi grows up to be a brave girl with a heart full of love and a divine blessing. What happens when she faces with treachery & betrayal?

programme.title: Suryavamsha
programme.desc: Sathyamurthy, the patriarch of Suryavamsha, an affluent village family, is in search of his long-lost grandson, when Karna enters the family under a pretence. Watch Karna unravel untold stories of his life, amid love and feud.

programme.title: Shanti Nivasaa
programme.desc: Warm-hearted & devoted housewife Shanthi has always been looked down upon by her husband & family. But a twist of fate puts Shanthi in a position to take on her nemesis, Manthra, to salvage her marriage and family.

programme.title: Myna
programme.desc: Born into a humble & rustic background troubled by familial & financial concerns, Myna takes it upon herself to leave home & fearlessly pursue a better life for her family. Watch her bravely face the odds of life with unwavering spirit.

programme.title: Sindhu Bhairavi
programme.desc: Sindhu loves her sister like a second mother & believes compassion outweighs all riches. But, Vasundhara, a woman of pride & privilege, worships money & social status. When their worlds collide, what trials will Sindhu face in her fight for justice?

programme.title: Sevanthi
programme.desc: Sevanthi is daily family entertainment serial in Udaya TV. Arjun and Anuradha both are grandchildren of Pramoda Devi. The family is wanting the duo to get hitched and their closeness has generated such emotion in the hearts of family members. However, because of tragedy befell on family of Anuradha, She end up growing as Sevanthi at an Ashram (orphanage) run by Shantamurthy. The Ashram one day lands in trouble as Sakshi, hailing from an elite family conspires to take over. To safeguard the ashram, Sevanthi approaches Arjun. The popular advocate Arjun put pre-condition of contractual marriage with her, only if Sevanthi agrees to that, he says, he will protect the Ashram. What would happen if a boy who has no belief in relationship and love marries a girl who lives breathing love and care is the knot of the tale.

programme.title: Rathasapthami
programme.desc: Sapthami's selfless nature often leads her into trouble, while Sreemanth's self-serving actions strain his ties with his own family. Their contrasting worlds collide when destiny takes their paths from conflict to togetherness.

programme.title: Mangalyaa
programme.desc: For Mayuri, family always comes first. For Tarak, bitterness towards his mother fuels every step. As their paths cross, love and revenge blur - witness the fate that binds Mayuri & Tarak together.

programme.title: Ravana Rajya
programme.desc: Movie starring Shuba, Thara, Bhavya and Narendra and directed by T S Nagabharana.

programme.title: Ravi Moodi Bhandha
programme.desc: Maala loves Raja but his father, a retired officer, disapproves of their relationship due to her mother. However, when Maala's mother is murdered, she strives to find the killer.

programme.title: Hello Sister
programme.desc: Mala, a tomboy, sets out to get married to her lover. But everything turns upside down when her enemies spread rumours that she is pregnant, resulting in her expulsion from the village.

programme.title: Kiladi
programme.desc: An arrogant girl becomes famous for her mischievous antics and erratic behaviour. However, she realises her mistakes once a righteous man enters her life.

programme.title: Movie -Annavru
programme.desc: A young man from the slums becomes friends with a local don. The two must stand together against a newly-appointed collector who threatens their rule over the town.

programme.title: Nammanna
programme.desc: A youth suspected to be a Naxalite, leaves the rural land and moves to the city, where his brother is killed by a mafia don. The youth takes the matter in his hands, kills the don and serves the poor.

programme.title: Arasu
programme.desc: Shivaraj falls in love with his manager's daughter, Shruthi. However, she refuses his proposal and challenges him to earn INR 5,000 without using any influence, before she can consider being with him.

programme.title: Central Jail
programme.desc: Inspector Pratap arrests Arjun, a crook, before he could kill the minister who falsely sent him to prison. However, when Arjun tells Pratap his side of the story, he is stunned.

programme.title: Movie -Deepa
programme.desc: Deepa is a Kannada drama starring Manjula, Ashok, Leelavathi, Hema Choudhary, Papamma, directed by C V Rajendran. Watch the full film, streaming on Hotstar.

programme.title: Sitanjaneya
programme.desc: Cast - Baby Sheetal, Bank Janardhan & Bharath

programme.title: Premotsava
programme.desc: Bharath is about to marry Bhavana, a teacher, but things change when his former lover, who he believed was dead, enters his life.

programme.title: Movie-Bachchan
programme.desc: A real estate businessman is forced to go on a vengeful crusade after the love of his life is tortured by goons.

programme.title: Gokula
programme.desc: Four young orphans pretend to be the grandchildren of a wealthy old man to inherit his wealth. But things take an emotional turn and the orphans start contemplating their evil plan.

programme.title: Kirathaka
programme.desc: Naveen Kumar Gowda, known by his screen name Yash, is an Indian actor who predominantly works in Kannada films.

programme.title: Whistle
programme.desc: When Ram, who works as a pizza delivery boy, learns that his girlfriend Anu is pregnant, he decides to marry her. Things take a turn when he visits Smitha Bungalow and experiences eerie incidents.

programme.title: Shanthi Shanthi Shanthi
programme.desc: Two siblings live with their father who refuses to give them money to pursue their goals. They befriend Raju, a poor man, who promises to help them achieve their dreams.

programme.title: Dil
programme.desc: An honest individual aspires to be a policeman. After constantly being undermined and bullied by a corrupt officer, he vows to expose his ill deeds.

programme.title: Dashamukha
programme.desc: Agni is accused of killing his father. The court appoints a committee to look into the matter and Ravindranath, who is a part of the committee, takes it upon himself to prove Agni's innocence.

programme.title: Chandramukhi 2
programme.desc: A woman suffers from dissociative identity disorder, which impacts her family. A psychiatrist plans to solve the case, but it puts his life in danger.

programme.title: Bangara S o Bangarada Manushya
programme.desc: When Shivraj, a wealthy businessman living in London, learns how his father led an agricultural revolution to save the farmers, he returns to India to help them again.

programme.title: Nataraja Service
programme.desc: Nataraja, a petty and unsuccessful thief, bumps into Sahana, who is considered to be an ill-omened girl. Things get complicated when the two fall in love with each other.

programme.title: Nammayajamanru
programme.desc: Namyajamanru is a 2009 Indian Kannada-language drama film directed and written by T. S. Nagabharana

programme.title: Shabaas Bhola
programme.desc: With unshakable faith in Mahakal Shiva, little Bhola becomes the fearless defender of Kailashpur against Tantric Bhimani's dark and evil plans.

programme.title: Lakh Takar Lokkhi Labh
programme.desc: This is an exclusive game show for women, where contestants can win cash prizes in various exciting games. Each episode's winner is rewarded with a grand cash prize of one lakh rupees. The show aims to help fulfill the dreams of women across Bengal.

programme.title: Bhalobashar Rong Route
programme.desc: Raised by hardship, Rupai grips the bus wheel with defiance. Scarred by betrayal, Rehan dons a nurse’s whites with quiet pride. Two souls’ shared fight for identity stands united in a relentless challenge to society’s gender norms.

programme.title: Sohage Adore
programme.desc: Surya marries his maid, Sohag, ruining his mother’s plans for an affluent match. As tensions rise, Sohag faces hostility from all sides. Surya’s devotion to her lights the way for their journey of love and healing in a broken family.

programme.title: Roopmati
programme.desc: Roopnagar's princess Roopmoti is the jewel of her people. Cast into exile, she finds herself guided by unseen powers & bound to a destiny greater than the crown she lost. Watch her rise to protect her kingdom from the dark forces of evil.

programme.title: Bhalobashar Rong Route

programme.title: Nandini
programme.desc: Nandini is a supernatural drama. Rajasekhar, a rich, influential man and his son Arun, live in a palatial home together with their extended family. Nandini, an Ichchadhaari Nagam”, (shapeshifting snake) awaits to avenge Rajasekhar’s past misdeed and regain the three ‘Kalachakram’ .
